formal_statement: G(theta) depends on atomic scattering factors, occupancies and z-coordinate distribution.
diagnostic_implication: Similar peak positions can have different intensities.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals
source.chapter_or_appendix: Chapter 3 / Appendix: Modeling One-Dimensional X-Ray Patterns

formal_statement: If two minerals have similar peak positions, do not assume similar intensities because G depends on chemistry and z coordinates.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals
source.chapter_or_appendix: Chapter 3 / Appendix: Modeling One-Dimensional X-Ray Patterns
